channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gunman killed after firing at Secret Service checkpoint near White House
item.description: A bystander was wounded, but no Secret Service officers were injured. President Trump was in the White House at the time.

item.title: Why jurors found Utah mother Kouri Richins guilty of murder
item.description: At her sentencing for murdering her husband Eric Richins, Kouri Richins maintained her innocence in court and to the families involved.

item.title: Second Ebola treatment center set on fire in outbreak's epicenter
item.description: Angry residents in a town at the epicenter of eastern Congo's Ebola outbreak attacked and burned a tent at a health center where patients were treated.

item.title: WATCH: Wedding ring recovered after Simi Valley fire
item.description: With help from the Los Angeles Fire Department, Randy and Beth Boyle recovered a wedding ring after their home burned in the Simi Valley fire.
